editorial_accuracy.notes: Fixed '1 sources' → '1 source' pluralization on homepage. Evidence tier badges in chapter headers. Source counts on all cards. In-chapter TOC. Keyword-based related chapters. Reading time. Semantic table captions.

information_design.notes: Chapter TOC for long articles. Evidence composition at-a-glance. Algorithmic topic matching for related chapters. Featured article card shows reading time + source count. Donation amount selector now functional.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Donation amount buttons now wire to Stripe prefilled_amount. Back-to-top button. Scroll position persistence. Evidence badges use semantic tier colors. Safe-area-inset for notch devices. Mobile menu Escape key close. Dark mode toggle.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. DONATE_URL extracted to shared constants.ts (was duplicated 5×). node_modules removed from git (was ~220 packages tracked). DownloadPDF deferred import. Reusable hooks + components. No hardcoded values.

accessibility.notes: aria-current='page' on nav links. Focus rings. Auth modal focus trap. Mobile nav Escape + aria-controls. Three distinct nav landmarks with aria-labels. Semantic table captions. Skip-to-content link. Print styles with grayscale-distinguishable evidence tiers.

security.notes: CSP meta tag restricts resources to self + Google Fonts + Stripe. X-Content-Type-Options nosniff. Strict referrer policy. All external links noopener noreferrer. node_modules no longer tracked in git.
